chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2717 of 2022 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.12063/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on Misc. No.12064/2022 (Ex/A). 3. For orders on Misc. No.12065/2022 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 29.04.2022. Ms. Sofia Saeed Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. Learned counsel states that on identical issue a petition bearing C.P. No.D-352/2022 has been filed, wherein not only notices have been issued but interim order has also been passed. She requests that the same order may also be passed in the instant petition. Let pre-admission notice be issued to the respondents as well as DAG. In the meanwhile the respondents may not take any adverse coercive action and/or pass any adverse order pursuant to the provision of Subsection (a)(i) of Section 3 of the Finance (Supplementary) Act, 2022 to the extent of omission of Entry 102 of the Sixth Schedule of the Sales Tax Act, 1980. In order to avoid piling up of demurrage charges, the request of the petitioner for provisional release of their consignments meant for Export Processing Zone, shall be considered in accordance with law, however, subject to deposit of the disputed amount(s) of sales tax by way of Pay Order /Bank Guarantee/cheque with the Nazir of this Court. Office is directed to tag C.P.

In order to avoid piling up of demurrage charges, the request of the petitioner for provisional release of their consignments meant for Export Processing Zone, shall be considered in accordance with law, however, subject to deposit of the disputed amount(s) of sales tax by way of Pay Order /Bank Guarantee/cheque with the Nazir of this Court. Office is directed to tag C.P. No.D-352/2022 along with the instant petition. JUDGE JUDGE
